wine_retailers.name: Millevini Enoteca
wine_retailers.address: Ramo del Fontego dei Tedeschi, San Marco 5362, 30124 Venezia, Italy
wine_retailers.speciality: Veneto and Friuli specialist; natural wines; grappa; international selection; sommelier-curated
wine_retailers.description: Founded 2001 by certified sommelier Lorenzo Menegus. Every bottle personally tasted and selected. Strong Veneto and Friuli backbone; also carries aged grappa, rum, whisky, and balsamic. One of Venice's most authoritative wine shops. Tel +39 041 5206090.

verified.address_quoted: Ramo del Fontego dei Tedeschi Sestiere San Marco, 5362 - 30100 Venezia (VE)

wine_retailers.name: Signorvino Verona - Piazza Erbe
wine_retailers.speciality: Pan-Italian wine retailer and bar; tasting counter; strong Veneto and Italian national selection; open daily 10:00-midnight
wine_retailers.description: Italian wine retailer Signorvino's Piazza Erbe location on Verona's famous medieval square. Combines a retail shop with a tasting bar for by-the-glass service. Strong Veneto range with national Italian breadth. Open daily until midnight. Tel +39 045 8012266.

wine_retailers.name: Enoteca Baraldi
wine_retailers.speciality: Organic and sustainably produced wines; deep Verona-region knowledge; retail and tasting hybrid; knowledgeable owner Bruno
wine_retailers.description: Family-owned enoteca led by owner Bruno Baraldi. Focused on organic and sustainably farmed labels from Verona's wine zones. Direct sourcing from smaller estates not widely distributed. Winedering-listed tasting events. Tel +39 045 566393.

wine_retailers.name: Cantine del Vino Gia Schiavi (Al Bottegon)
wine_retailers.speciality: 500+ Italian labels; historic Dorsoduro bacaro and retail wine shop combined; standing-only; Mon-Sat 8:30-20:30
wine_retailers.description: Established 1800, this Dorsoduro institution is both an enoteca and a bacaro. 500+ labels from Italian producers; retail purchase possible. Standing wine bar at lunch with freshly made cicchetti. Known as 'Al Bottegon' by Venetians. Tel +39 041 5230034.

wine_retailers.name: Enoteca del Soave
wine_retailers.speciality: Soave Classico and Soave DOC specialist; Valpolicella; Lessini Durello; Garganega-Trebbiano and pure Garganega expressions
wine_retailers.description: Founded 1980 in the medieval village of Soave; returned to direct management by Cantina del Castello in April 2024. The most comprehensive retail selection of Soave wines in the region. Also stocks Valpolicella and Lessini Durello sparkling. Tel +39 0457681588.

wine_retailers.name: Poli Grappateca Bassano
wine_retailers.address: Via Gamba 6, 36061 Bassano del Grappa (VI), Italy
wine_retailers.speciality: Poli grappa retail; full Poli distillate range; historic miniature bottle collection; also spirits from other Veneto producers
wine_retailers.description: The retail shop attached to the Poli Grappa Museum in central Bassano del Grappa. Full range of Poli grappas, brandies, and digestivi for purchase. Daily 9:00-19:30. The miniature grappa museum (1,500 bottles) is viewable at no charge during shop hours.

verified.address_quoted: Via Gamba 6 (Ponte Vecchio) Bassano del Grappa (VI) - Italia

wine_retailers.name: Casa Vinicola Zonin Enoteca
wine_retailers.speciality: Gambellara Classico DOC; Veneto range; Zonin estates across Italy; visitor centre and direct-to-consumer retail
wine_retailers.description: The historic Gambellara headquarters of Italy's largest private wine producer. Direct retail of the full Zonin range including Gambellara Classico DOC, Prosecco, Valpolicella, and wines from their eight Italian estates. Visitor centre with tasting appointments. Tel +39 0444 640111.

wine_retailers.name: Consorzio Tutela Vini Soave Shop
wine_retailers.speciality: Official Soave consortium retail and information point; curated member producer bottles; wine education resources
wine_retailers.description: The Soave wine consortium's official visitor presence in the village of Soave. Curated retail selection of member producers' wines covering the full Soave DOC and DOCG spectrum. Best starting point for understanding the appellation's different zones and producers.

wine_retailers.name: Nardini Grapperia Shop
wine_retailers.address: Ponte Vecchio 2, 36061 Bassano del Grappa (VI), Italy
wine_retailers.speciality: Full Nardini grappa range; Aqua Vitae; Tagliatella herbal liqueur; historic branded merchandise
wine_retailers.description: The retail arm of Italy's oldest grappa distillery (est. 1779) at the foot of Ponte degli Alpini. Sells the full Nardini range including white, aged, and flavoured grappas, plus Tagliatella and Aqua Vitae. Tue-Sat 9:00-13:00 and 14:00-18:00. Tel +39 0424 227744.

wine_retailers.name: Consorzio Prosecco Superiore DOCG Shop
wine_retailers.address: Villa Brandolini, Via Brandolini 39, 31020 Solighetto (TV), Italy
wine_retailers.speciality: Conegliano Valdobbiadene Prosecco Superiore DOCG retail and information; 18th-century Villa Brandolini; consortium member producer selection
wine_retailers.description: The Consorzio Conegliano Valdobbiadene Prosecco Superiore's headquarters in the 18th-century Villa Brandolini at Solighetto. Curated retail of member producer bottles covering the full DOCG spectrum from Rive single-vineyard to Cartizze and Colfondo. Best reference point for the appellation.
